activities.name: Shantang Street (Seven-Li Shantang)

activities.tips: 🌧️ Rain expected - bring an umbrella and waterproof jacket | 💡 Rarely crowded; a cool, informative retreat on a hot day.

activities.name: Lake Tai (Taihu) - Yinshan Island
